title: It's Time for the Racecourse Gourmet Fair!

text_block_list.name: Buena & Cesario
text_block_list.text: The Gourmet Fair at Tokyo Racecourse is now open～!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Today's unveiling event is packed with fun! We've got a gourmet quiz and even a tasting session!

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: We'll be handing out the fair's top recommendation, the Special Frappe, at the tasting session! Please look forward to it♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Eh!? A traffic jam…!?

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text: Yes… The truck transporting the frappes from the store got caught in it… They say they've already been stuck in traffic for an hour.

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: An hour… It doesn't look like they'll make it in time for the scheduled tasting. We'll just have to prepare a substitute…

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text: …You're right. Let's contact everyone we can and find a store that can provide samples for us.

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text:
If that doesn't work… We could cancel the tasting and issue coupons instead… 
That's another option…

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Let's proceed with multiple backup plans just in case, and try reaching out to each store anyway.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Can't we wait for the frappes to arrive?

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Eh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The store got everything ready… Just for today, right? To make all the race fans happy.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The staff transporting them right now 
must feel the same way. They're doing their best to deliver them for the fans.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If that's the case, I want to make sure those feelings reach the fans. As an event organizer, I want to do everything in my power, too.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So, for example… Why don't we hand out 
the frappes as parting gifts at the end? That way—

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: —Yeah. That should give them enough time. Let's adjust the stage schedule as well.

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text: We'll support the transport from our end, too. They just need to get out of that traffic jam!

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: If they're parting gifts… Let's put a little more effort into decorating the cups, too…

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: Then let's head to the stage. We'll keep the crowd hyped up until the frappes arrive!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Yeah! Thank you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: We have an announcement for everyone. Unfortunately, the frappes scheduled for the tasting session are currently delayed in transit…

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Eeeh! 
Does that mean we can't eat them～?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: But please don't worry! We're all doing our best right now to make sure you get to taste them!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Racecourse gourmet food is a warm presence that livens up URA events.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The collaboration stores helping us out today have also nourished the hearts of us Horsegirls—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: They're all full of warm gourmet foods packed with everyone's memories.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: We want you all to taste this wonderful food. We're running around with that single thought in mind.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So, please allow us to change the schedule and distribute the frappes at the very end as a parting gift. Please look forward to them.

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Thank you～～!! 
We can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: Now then, while we wait for the frappes, let's get into our special program!

text_block_list.name: Buena & Cesario
text_block_list.text:
Buena & Cesario's Gourmet 
Recommendation Talk!
(Yaaay!!)
The Gourmet Fair's unveiling event was a massive success—and the fair, which ran for a month, was a huge hit day after day.
